name: Fruchtsalat Mit Nussen (Fruit Salad with Nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out melon using a melon baller.
2. Cut the peel from oranges, remove white membranes, and slice crosswise.
3. Cut grapes in half and remove seeds.
4. Arrange melon balls, orange slices, grapes, and walnuts on top of lettuce leaves in a glass bowl.
5. Mix and blend well all ingredients for the dressing: 8 oz Yogurt (1 Container), 2 tbsp Evaporated Milk, 1 tbsp Lemon Juice, 1 tbsp Orange Juice, 1 tbsp Tomato Catsup, salt to taste, white pepper to taste.
6. Adjust seasonings as desired.
7. Pour the dressing over the fruit.
8. Let the salad ingredients marinate for 30 minutes.
9. Toss the salad just before serving.
